---
title: "06-21-2026-BulkRNA_DE_Anlysis"
output: html_document
---

```{rsetup }
## ============================================================
## de_ko_vs_wt_all_samples.R
## DESeq2 differential expression: KO vs WT within each line
## (OPA1 / ATF4 / AO), on ALL 43 samples with ORIGINAL labels
## (NO relabeling, NO removals).
## Volcano per contrast: top 10 up + top 10 down labeled,
## Opa1 / Atf4 / Fgf21 always highlighted + labeled.
## Positive log2FC = UP in KO relative to WT.
## ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(DESeq2)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
})

tsv    <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DATA/salmon.merged.gene_counts_length_scaled.relabeled.tsv"
outdir <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/RESULTS/DE_ANALYSIS/RELABELED/"
dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

markers <- c("Opa1", "Atf4", "Fgf21")   # always labeled
lfc_thr <- 1                              # |log2FC| threshold for coloring
p_thr   <- 0.05                           # padj threshold
n_top   <- 10                             # top genes per side to label

## ---- 1. Load counts -----------------------------------------------------
raw <- read.delim(tsv, check.names = FALSE)
rownames(raw) <- make.unique(raw$gene_name)
mat <- round(as.matrix(raw[, !(colnames(raw) %in% c("gene_id", "gene_name"))]))

## ---- 2. Metadata + apply corrections (relabel + drop partial responders) -
parts <- strsplit(colnames(mat), "_")
meta <- data.frame(
  row.names = colnames(mat),
  genotype  = vapply(parts, function(x) paste(x[1], x[2], sep = "_"), ""),
  diet      = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 3),
  id        = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 4),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

relabel_meta <- function(meta) {
  swaps <- c("2"="OPA1_KO","A1"="AO_KO","D1"="AO_KO","26"="AO_WT","30"="AO_WT",
             "13"="ATF4_KO","16"="ATF4_KO","35"="ATF4_WT")
  hit <- meta$id %in% names(swaps)
  meta$genotype[hit] <- swaps[meta$id[hit]]
  meta
}
drop_partial_responders <- function(meta)
  meta[!meta$id %in% c("7","F1","E1","B1","G1"), , drop = FALSE]

meta <- relabel_meta(meta)
meta <- drop_partial_responders(meta)
mat  <- mat[, rownames(meta)]                       # keep matrix aligned (38)

meta$geno_line  <- sub("_.*", "", meta$genotype)    # OPA1 / ATF4 / AO
meta$geno_short <- factor(sub(".*_", "", meta$genotype), levels = c("WT","KO"))
meta$diet       <- factor(meta$diet, levels = c("CD","HFD"))


# ## ---- 2. Metadata from ORIGINAL column names (no corrections) ------------
# parts <- strsplit(colnames(mat), "_")
# meta <- data.frame(
#   row.names = colnames(mat),
#   genotype  = vapply(parts, function(x) paste(x[1], x[2], sep = "_"), ""),
#   diet      = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 3),
#   id        = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 4),
#   stringsAsFactors = FALSE
# )
# meta$geno_line  <- sub("_.*", "", meta$genotype)    # OPA1 / ATF4 / AO
# meta$geno_short <- factor(sub(".*_", "", meta$genotype), levels = c("WT","KO"))
# meta$diet       <- factor(meta$diet, levels = c("CD","HFD"))


## ---- 3. Per-line DE: KO vs WT, controlling for diet ---------------------
run_de <- function(line) {
  keep <- rownames(meta)[meta$geno_line == line]
  cd   <- meta[keep, ]
  cd$geno_short <- droplevels(cd$geno_short)
  dds  <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(mat[, keep], cd, design = ~ diet + geno_short)
  dds  <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) >= 3, ]
  dds  <- DESeq(dds)
  coef <- "geno_short_KO_vs_WT"
  res  <- results(dds, name = coef)
  if (requireNamespace("apeglm", quietly = TRUE))
    res <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = coef, type = "apeglm")
  as.data.frame(res)
}

## ---- 4. Volcano --------------------------------------------------------
make_volcano <- function(res, line) {
  d <- res
  d$gene <- rownames(d)
  d <- d[!is.na(d$padj), ]
  d$neglog10p <- pmin(-log10(d$padj), 300)
  d$dir <- "ns"
  d$dir[d$padj < p_thr & d$log2FoldChange >  lfc_thr] <- "up"
  d$dir[d$padj < p_thr & d$log2FoldChange < -lfc_thr] <- "down"

  ups   <- d[d$dir == "up",   ]; ups   <- ups[order(-ups$log2FoldChange), ]
  downs <- d[d$dir == "down", ]; downs <- downs[order(downs$log2FoldChange), ]
  lab_genes <- unique(c(head(ups$gene, n_top), head(downs$gene, n_top),
                        intersect(markers, d$gene)))
  d$lab       <- ifelse(d$gene %in% lab_genes, d$gene, "")
  d$is_marker <- d$gene %in% markers

  arr <- arrow(length = unit(0.012, "npc"), type = "closed")
  ggplot(d, aes(log2FoldChange, neglog10p)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_thr, lfc_thr), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_thr),        linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
    geom_point(aes(color = dir), size = 1.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(up = "#B2182B", down = "#2166AC", ns = "grey80"),
                       breaks = c("up","down"), name = NULL,
                       labels = c("up in KO","down in KO")) +
    geom_point(data = subset(d, is_marker), shape = 21, fill = "#F2A900",
               color = "black", size = 3.1, stroke = 0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(d, lab != "" & !is_marker),
                    aes(label = lab), size = 2.7, color = "grey20",
                    max.overlaps = Inf, min.segment.length = 0,
                    segment.size = 0.3, box.padding = 0.4, seed = 1, arrow = arr) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(d, is_marker),
                    aes(label = gene), size = 3, fontface = "bold",
                    color = "#7A4D00", max.overlaps = Inf, min.segment.length = 0,
                    segment.size = 0.3, box.padding = 0.6, seed = 1, arrow = arr) +
    labs(x = expression(log[2]~fold~change~(KO/WT)),
         y = expression(-log[10]~adjusted~p),
         title = sprintf("%s line: KO vs WT  (relabeled, original labels)", line),
         subtitle = sprintf("%d up / %d down at padj<%.2f & |log2FC|>%g",
                            sum(d$dir == "up"), sum(d$dir == "down"), p_thr, lfc_thr)) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "top")
}

## ---- 5. Run all three, save tables + volcanoes --------------------------
for (line in c("OPA1", "ATF4", "AO")) {
  res <- run_de(line)
  res <- res[order(res$padj), ]
  write.csv(data.frame(gene = rownames(res), res, row.names = NULL),
            file.path(outdir, sprintf("DE_%s_KOvsWT_relabeled.csv", line)), row.names = FALSE)
  ggsave(file.path(outdir, sprintf("volcano_%s_KOvsWT_relabeled.png", line)),
         make_volcano(res, line), width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 150)
  cat(sprintf("%s line: %d genes tested  ->  DE_%s_KOvsWT_relabeled.csv, volcano_%s_KOvsWT_relabeled.png\n",
              line, nrow(res), line, line))
}




```
